unresolved_risks: Log injection: client-supplied X-Request-ID containing newlines embeds them in log output. Low severity — no execution path, only cosmetic log pollution. Mitigate later with a log sanitizer or header value length cap.
rollback_command: git checkout main && git branch -D feat/build-ewa-request-id-20260320
summary: Added request_id middleware to backend/server.py. Clients can supply X-Request-ID (echoed back) or the server generates a UUID4. ID is set on request.state before log_requests runs, so it appears in every log line as rid=<id> and in every response header. 4 new pytest tests cover all acceptance criteria. 1 pre-existing failure (test_intentional_failure DR drill) unchanged. Pre-existing backend_test.py collection error (missing aiohttp) is unrelated.
suggested_next: Merge feat/build-ewa-request-id-20260320 to main via PR (Tier-2 approval). Optionally add X-Request-ID to CORS expose_headers so browser clients can read it.
